note: BRAIN layer — Day 23 (Easter Sunday). No change to outcomes — IMAP not checked. All three warm-pipeline leads remain OUTCOME_UNKNOWN. Today: Easter Sunday, no contact. Tomorrow (Easter Monday): no contact. HANDS must check IMAP on 2026-04-22 (Tuesday) and update outcome fields immediately — this is the single highest-priority action of the post-Easter return.

items.status: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — last BRAIN-confirmed action: proposal nudge sent ~2026-04-10. Final close was due ~2026-04-14. HANDS: check IMAP 2026-04-22 and update this field: CONVERTED / LOST / LOST_NO_RESPONSE / STILL_LIVE.
items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online booking system — self-reported lost customers

option_b.name: Full Fix — Recommended
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + Fresha booking widget integration + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Fresha is free for the salon — zero monthly cost objection.

if_she_replied_yes_to_nudge.action: CONVERTED. Log £350 (Option B most likely). Write CHANGELOG.md — first campaign revenue conversion. Confirm delivery timeline: 3-4 working days. Send agreement or invoice.
if_she_replied_yes_to_nudge.milestone: FIRST REVENUE — validate entire campaign model

if_she_replied_with_questions.action: Answer clearly and concisely. Fresha is free for the salon. Timeline is 3-4 working days. Keep response short and confident. One reply to close.

if_she_replied_no.action: Mark LOST. Log in CRM. Reply: 'Thanks for letting me know, Claire — good luck with the season ahead.' No further contact.

if_no_reply_to_nudge_and_final_close_not.action: Send ONE final close — 'Claire — happy to leave this with you. If the timing changes, you know where I am.' Then mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Do NOT resend proposal. Do NOT discount.
if_no_reply_to_nudge_and_final_close_not.note: If final close was already sent ~2026-04-14: check IMAP to see if she replied since. If still silent by 2026-04-22: mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE without sending another message.

items.status: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — last BRAIN-confirmed action: nudge sent 2026-04-07. Final nudge window was 2026-04-13 if still silent. Close by 2026-04-15. HANDS: check IMAP 2026-04-22 and update this field.
items.reply_summary: Asked whether SSL/mobile can be bundled into full redesign. 'Sort the whole thing in one go' — upsell signal.

option_b.name: Full Redesign Bundle
option_b.scope: New design + SSL + mobile + contact form + portfolio gallery

option_c.name: Redesign + Ongoing SEO
option_c.scope: Option B + monthly local SEO ('print shop Sowerby Bridge')

if_replied_and_deal_alive.action: Scope doc or call. Three options laid out simply (A, B, C). If he asks for scope doc: send today. If he wants a call: offer a slot this week. Do not discount.

if_replied_post_easter.action: Treat as fresh — he may have replied over Easter weekend or Monday morning. Respond promptly and move to close this week.

if_replied_no.action: Mark LOST. Log in CRM. Thank him briefly. No further contact.

if_no_reply_final_close_not_sent.action: Send final close — 'Rob — happy to leave it here. If things change and you want to revisit, you know where I am.' Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE.

items.status: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — last BRAIN-confirmed action: nudge sent 2026-04-08. Final nudge window was 2026-04-13. Close by 2026-04-14. HANDS: check IMAP 2026-04-22 and update this field.
items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online quote form — customers told to ring instead

if_replied_wants_to_proceed.action: Confirm call slot Tuesday or Wednesday. Spec: quote form, 3-4 fields, email notification, mobile-friendly. Price: £100-150. Timeline: 2-3 days. Agree on the call and close this week.

if_replied_post_easter.action: Treat as fresh — trades people often clear inbox first thing Tuesday. Respond immediately.

if_replied_no.action: Mark LOST. Log in CRM. Brief and gracious reply.

if_no_reply_final_close_not_sent.action: Send final close — 'Tom — going to leave this with you. If the quote form ever rises to the top of the list, you know where I am.' Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE.
if_no_reply_final_close_not_sent.note: Tom was genuinely interested — acknowledged the pain, asked about pricing. The silence is likely busyness, not rejection.

summary.overdue_description: All three warm-pipeline leads have been in OUTCOME_UNKNOWN for 13-16 days. Proposal close windows have passed for Rob (2026-04-15) and Tom (2026-04-14). Claire's close window was ~2026-04-14. HANDS must resolve all three on 2026-04-22 morning before any cold send.

pipeline_value_estimate.lead_3_claire: £350 (Option B most likely) — if still convertible
pipeline_value_estimate.lead_22_rob: £550-675 (redesign bundle + possible SEO retainer) — if still convertible

conversion_probability_post_easter.lead_3_claire: LOW-MEDIUM — 13 days since call, 10 days since nudge. Deal has cooled significantly. Post-Easter fresh-start possible if she replied with any positive intent during the break.
conversion_probability_post_easter.lead_22_rob: LOW-MEDIUM — 13 days since nudge. Easter may mean buried reply. May have read/replied over the long weekend. Check immediately.
conversion_probability_post_easter.lead_1_tom: LOW — 12 days since nudge. Trades people move on quickly. If no reply by now, likely lost. Still worth one final close attempt.
